narrative:
Guyan Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 479 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.4 percentage points.
